# claude_workspace (Resource)

Manages a Claude workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_workspace" "example" {
  name = "Engineering"

  data_residency = {
    workspace_geo          = "us"
    default_inference_geo  = "us"
    allowed_inference_geos = ["us"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the workspace.

### Optional

- `data_residency` (Attributes) Data residency configuration for the workspace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_residency))

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) The timestamp when the workspace was archived, or null if active.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the workspace was created.
- `display_color` (String) The display color of the workspace, set by the API.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the workspace.

<a id="nestedatt--data_residency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_residency`

Optional:

- `allowed_inference_geos` (List of String) The allowed geographic regions for inference. Use ["unrestricted"] to allow all regions.
- `default_inference_geo` (String) The default geographic region for inference.
- `workspace_geo` (String) The geographic region for workspace data. Cannot be changed after creation.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import claude_workspace.example wrkspc_01EXAMPLE
```
